description: Point your root (apex) domain at your VeloCMS blog via www and prove ownership so we can issue your SSL certificate. The apex-to-www redirect stays a manual registrar step.
variableDescription: target = the per-domain CNAME target VeloCMS provides for the www host. txthost + txt = the domain-ownership verification TXT record (name + value) VeloCMS issues so we can validate the domain and provision its SSL certificate. This template applies at the zone apex; the site is served via the www record.
